# HV_MSR_IA32_SPEC_CTRL | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Hypervisor ](/documentation/hypervisor)

-  HV_MSR_IA32_SPEC_CTRL 

Global Variable# HV_MSR_IA32_SPEC_CTRL

The value that represents the address of Speculation Control Register.macOS

```
var HV_MSR_IA32_SPEC_CTRL: UInt32 { get }
```

## [See Also](/documentation/hypervisor/hv_msr_ia32_spec_ctrl#see-also)
